title: Policy: Policy applied - Restart Headset - Settings stay locked
scenario: Policy-affected settings remain locked after headset power cycle when policy is applied via Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and select the connected Poly headset.
3. Go to Device Settings and apply a policy that locks specific settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
4. Confirm the policy is applied and the affected settings appear locked/grayed out in the app.
5. Press and hold the Power button on the headset to turn it off.
6. Wait a few seconds, then press and hold the Power button again to turn the headset back on.
7. Reconnect the headset to the Android device via Bluetooth if not automatically reconnected.
8. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the previously locked settings (e.g., Audio Settings → ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
expected: Settings affected by the policy remain locked/grayed out in the app after the headset is turned off and on again.
